description: A corporate event planner wants to book a two-day conference at the venue.

nodes.task_description: Check the availability of the main hall and three breakout rooms for the requested dates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that the requested spaces are available.

nodes.task_description: Generate a quote based on room rental, standard A/V package, and estimated catering costs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates and sends a detailed quote to the client.

nodes.task_description: Place a temporary hold on the spaces and send the standard rental contract to the client for signature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully places a 14-day hold and sends the contract.
